education.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering

projects.title: TodoRevamp
description: Developed a full-stack task management web application using React.js with responsive UI (HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript ES6),leveraging component-based architecture and efficient state management
Handled asynchronous API requests using Fetch API, processed JSON responses, and integrated RESTful services to inject AI-generated task suggestions via backend LLM model APIs.
Implemented JWT-based authentication and role-based access control using Spring Boot and deployed scalable backend services on Google Cloud Run.

projects.title: Wiretest
description: Engineered a train reservation system supporting multi-segment seat allocation across routes, dates, and weekday-based scheduling using optimized date computation logic.
Implemented transactional concurrency control using row-level and next-key locking under REPEATABLE READ isolation to prevent race conditions, phantom inserts, and seat overbooking.
Developed an Android-based medical assistant application using Kotlin and Jetpack Compose following MVVM architecture principles
Integrated REST APIs using Retrofit, implemented local data persistence with Room, and managed dependency injection using Hilt

achievements.title: Top 5% nationally in NPTEL Modern C++ Programming
Led team at Smart India Hackathon 2024 to build Rail Madad System, reducing complaint resolution time
Completed Dhimahi (Ultimate Wisdom) course on Indian Knowledge System through Heartfulness Education Trust.

certifications.title: Getting Started with JavaScript from PupilFirst
